basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Clinical Research Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of TMC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

content_sections.heading: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Tata Memorial Centre recruitment is Clinical Research Coordinator.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clinical Research Coordinator position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 29th July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BSc/B.Pharm/Msc/M.pharm/BAMS/BDS/BHMS/BUMS degree along with a PG Diploma in Clinical Research and one year of experience in clinical research.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Clinical Research Coordinator post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 29,000/- per month, subject to the availability of funds and based on qualification and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the HRD Department, 1st Floor, Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Aganampudi, Visakhapatnam- 530053.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their Bio-data, recent Passport size Photograph, xerox copy of PAN Card, AADHAAR Card, Original Certificates, and a set of attested copies of all certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is from 09:00 A.M. to 10:00 A.M.
